rationale: Customer support role at fictional company Stark Industries with 1.1 years experience, marketing manager background, and zero engineering or ML skills — completely misaligned with a production IR/ranking engineering role.

6 years at product companies (Yellow.ai, Zomato) with IIT Guwahati/Madras education and PEFT/PyTorch skills, but primary ML work is computer vision and TTS rather than retrieval/ranking/IR, with no evidence of embedding-based search, vector databases, or NDCG evaluation frameworks.

Career spans civil engineering, accounting, and content writing across Wipro and fictional Stark Industries, with no ML, NLP, or IR experience whatsoever despite superficial data-pipeline skill listing.

5.9 years of backend/mobile engineering at CRED (a product company) shows solid software fundamentals, but all ML experience is self-learner level (online courses, small RAG side project) with no production ML, ranking, or retrieval work, and skills profile shows object detection and MLOps rather than IR.
Content writer at fictional Stark Industries for 2 years with a marketing manager background, Photoshop/PowerPoint as primary tools, and no engineering or ML experience at all.

3.9 years of Java/Node.js backend engineering at Globex Inc and fictional Hooli with a Physics degree, self-learner AI exposure only, and skills dominated by ASR and reinforcement learning with no retrieval, ranking, or vector search experience.

4.7 years at product companies (Swiggy, Zomato) in frontend and DevOps roles with no production ML; recommendation systems listed as an intermediate skill but with only 15 months duration and no evidence of retrieval, NDCG evaluation, or embedding-based systems in actual job descriptions.

14 years across sales, operations, HR (at Infosys), and accounting at fictional Initech with SEO/Sales as primary skills — a non-technical career with zero ML or engineering work despite recent AI curiosity.

Career is entirely non-technical (business analyst at Infosys, graphic designer at TCS, civil engineer at fictional Wayne Enterprises) with MLOps listed at intermediate for only 9 months — a clear anti-persona with no relevant IR, ML, or ranking engineering experience.

2.3 years as a civil engineer at Wipro (IT services) whose actual work was B2B SaaS marketing/demand-generation, with skills limited to Terraform, Angular, and Spring Boot and no ML or retrieval experience.
